sheet_name: แปลนโครงหลังคา
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า27.png
view_title: แปลนโครงหลังคา
grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/02บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json
schema_note: roof_plan is a draft pattern per spec section 1 (#12, no confirmed field-set yet) -- light-gauge cold-formed steel purlins/rafters, not rebar, so no main_bar/stirrup fields apply here. Roof frame only covers the main F-C block (grid span 9.60m x 9.60m), not the porch/carport extension south of grid C -- consistent with S-04/S-05 where the extension's roof isn't detailed on this sheet.

steel_members.spacing_note: one rafter at every grid column position (1,2,3,4), running full length F to C

detail_reference: ดูขยาย① (see hanger detail 'ขยาย 1' on S-08) at the C-4 corner -- purlin-to-rafter hanger connection
warnings: The 1.30m/1.50m roof eave overhangs beyond the named grid are dimensional notes for the roof only, not structural grid/beam lines -- not added as dummy grid lines to the shared grid master. If a later architecture-discipline read finds a WALL or BEAM at this same offset (not just a roof eave), that would need a real dummy grid line and should be flagged separately.
